{{Quote|Come to me, rancor!|Silri|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Cuddles''' was [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Silri]]'s pet [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]. It was trained by Silri to work for the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] and attacks only enemies, not Zann Consortium members. Cuddles later helped [[Tyber Zann]], [[Urai Fen]], and Silri raid [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Archives (museum)/Legends|Museum]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to retrieve an [[Carbonite Sith Army holocron|ancient Sith holocron]] stolen from the Zann Consortium by [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'', Cuddles is summoned up from the ground during land battles when Silri uses her "Summon Rancor" ability.
